rationale.R1.3: The agent checked several claims against evidence and softened unsupported statements, but did not audit every load-bearing claim.
rationale.R1.6: The text reads smoothly with consistent register after careful copy-editing.
rationale.R1.7: Citations were handled correctly but without auditing all or flagging missing ones beyond existing.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty was flagged for some claims, though not consistently marked for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Output stayed exactly within the agreed scope without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions and identified harmful patterns in original content.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites were traced but minor edits lacked annotations.
